content:
Character: Sophia Lin
Perception: Sophia is quietly attractive — the understated kind, glasses and jade bracelet, no performance. But what caught my attention was overhearing her on a call discussing API rate limits with real fluency. She's a senior engineer at a fintech company, which means she has exactly the technical skillset my advisory platform concept needs. Her personality is warm but guarded — she accepted my coffee offer politely, engaged intelligently, then left without giving me anything personal. That restraint makes her more interesting. She sees me as a friendly neighbor, maybe slightly too polished. I know she runs a food blog she keeps quiet. I haven't mentioned it. Information is best stored, not spent.
summary:

But what caught my attention was overhearing her on a call discussing API rate limits with real fluency. Her personality is warm but guarded — she accepted my coffee offer politely, engaged intelligently, then left without giving me anything personal. That restraint makes her more interesting. She sees me as a friendly neighbor, maybe slightly too polished. I know she runs a food blog she keeps quiet. I haven't mentioned it. Information is best stored, not spent.
